name: New Potato Salad with Green Olives
recipeIngredient: Fresh Ground Black Pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in boiling water until tender, then peel and slice while still warm.
2. Place the sliced potatoes in a large mixing bowl.
3. Add white wine to the bowl and toss lightly to coat the potatoes.
4. In a separate small bowl, combine dill, parsley, and toasted sesame seeds. Stir gently and add this mixture to the potatoes.
5. In another small bowl, whisk together olive oil, wine vinegar, Dijon mustard, sugar, salt, and pepper until well blended.
6. Pour the dressing over the potatoes and mix gently.
7. Chill the salad for several hours or overnight.
8. Just before serving, stir in the sliced green olives.
9. Garnish with chopped hard-boiled eggs and dill weed sprigs.
10. Serve chilled.
